The '''Third Fleet''' was one of the three main fleets of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. For a time, it was based at [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]; it later participated in [[Operation Durge's Lance]] and the [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]].

Given its location in the Core, it presumably also participated in the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].

{{Military-stub}}
